texto: Arguably, horror may be understood as a fictional indulgence in fantasies of violence, and our fascination with it seen as a form of sublimation of repressed desires. If we accept this line of thinking, then horror has the benefit of, at least, being one of the most honest of genres.

If we accept this line of thinking, then horror has the benefit of, at least, being one of the most honest of genres.
